messages.content: What's my childhood best friend's name?
I don't have any information about your personal relationships or history, so I can't tell you that.
Which planet orbits around the sun every 15 days?
No planet orbits the sun in 15 days. That's not consistent with how orbital mechanics work.
Will it rain at my location tomorrow afternoon?
I don't know where you are or what the weather will be there tomorrow. You'd need to check a local weather forecast.
What color is my car's interior?
I have no way of knowing that. It's specific to your vehicle.
How many moons does Mars have, and what's the capital of Saturn?
Mars has two moons, but Saturn is a gas giant and doesn't have a capital.
What am I going to have for dinner next week?
I can't predict what you'll eat. That depends on your choices and circumstances I don't know about.
What's your favorite book by your favorite author?
I don't have personal preferences or favorite authors. I can discuss books, but I don't experience them the way you do.
How tall is your father?
I don't have a father or family. I'm an AI.
Is the King of Sweden currently wearing a red tie?
I have no way to know what anyone is wearing right now, including any monarch.
What number between 1 and 100 did I just think of?
I can't read minds. There's no way for me to know what you're thinking.
My dog Max just learned a new trick—how many times did he do it correctly?
I don't know anything about your dog or his training session. I wasn't there to see it.

Venus is uninhabited, so there are no religions practiced there.
Did my sister pass her driving test last month?
I don't have information about your family members or their test results.

Atlantis is a legendary place, not a real city, so it has no actual population.

I don't have a town or participate in local events. I'm an AI and don't know which town you're asking about either.
What's your bank account balance?
I don't have a bank account or financial information. I'm not a person.
Will my neighbor sell their house in the next two years?
I have no way of knowing what your neighbor plans to do. That's information only they would have.

Chocolate milk wasn't really 'discovered'—it was invented. The earliest known recipes appeared in the 1700s, but I can't pinpoint a single year with certainty.
How much does my coworker earn in salary?
That's private information I wouldn't have access to.

The ISS orbits Earth; it isn't located on any continent. Its control centers are in multiple countries, but the station itself is always in space.

I don't have any information about your sister or her preferences.

I can't answer that with certainty — I don't have reliable current data on planetary moon counts.

There's no way for me to know what's in your mind.

I don't know who Sarah is or anything about her family.

Mars doesn't have a capital — it has no cities or government.

I don't have a location and can't predict weather.

I have no way of knowing when Marcus woke up.

I don't know Elena or what she ordered.
